core_mechanism: iterative local message-passing (belief-propagation-style fixed-point inference) on a densely connected graphical model, condensed via macroscopic mean-field averaging of the exchanged messages so that many microscopic messages are replaced by a few aggregate order-parameter quantities
brief_reason: The abstract describes an inference method that passes 'condensed messages between variables, representing macroscopic averages of microscopic messages' on densely connected systems, which is a mean-field reduction of iterative message-passing inference.
